content.content:
# OhMyDoc v2 — QA Report

**Date:** 2026-03-04
**Target:** https://ohmydoc-using-claude-code-agent-eta.vercel.app
**Browser:** Chromium (Playwright 1.58.2)
**Total Tests:** 12 | **Passed:** 7 | **Failed:** 5

---

## Executive Summary

The OhMyDoc v2 deployment has a **critical blocker**: the AI API key is not configured in the Vercel environment. The error message `"OpenAI API key is not configured."` is displayed whenever the user tries to format a document. This makes the app's core feature — AI-powered document formatting — completely non-functional in production.

All 5 test failures trace directly to this single root cause. The remaining 7 tests (static UI, input validation) pass cleanly.

---

## Critical Bug — P0 Blocker

### BUG-001: OpenAI API Key Not Configured in Vercel Deployment

| Field       | Detail |
|-------------|--------|
| **Severity**    | P0 — Blocker (core feature completely broken) |
| **Component**   | Vercel deployment / environment variables |
| **Error text**  | `"OpenAI API key is not configured."` |
| **Affected tests** | 2, 3, 4, 5, 7 (all AI-dependent flows) |
| **Reproduction** | Paste any text → click "Format My Resume" → see error immediately |
| **Fix**         | Add `OPENAI_API_KEY` (or equivalent) to Vercel project environment variables |

**Observed behaviour after clicking "Format My Resume":**
1. Button briefly shows "Formatting..." ✓ (UI works)
2. Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel ✓ (UI works)
3. API call fails → preview panel shows `"OpenAI API key is not configured."` with a "Try Again" button ✗
4. "Export PDF" button remains disabled ✗

---

## Test Results

### Group 1: Basic Load

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 1a | Page title is "OhMyDoc" | ✅ PASS | Title matches |
| 1b | Textarea visible & accepts input | ✅ PASS | Works correctly |
| 1c | Format button disabled on empty textarea | ✅ PASS | Disabled until content entered |
| 1d | Right panel shows placeholder text | ✅ PASS | "Your formatted document will appear here." |
| 1e | No critical console errors on load | ✅ PASS | No errors logged at page load |

### Group 2: Happy Path — Resume

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 2 | Resume formatting end-to-end | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — API key not configured |

**Error:** `[BUG] Deployment misconfiguration: "OpenAI API key is not configured." The Vercel deployment is missing the required AI API key environment variable.`

**Partially observed (UI behaves correctly up to the API call):**
- ✅ Button transitions to "Formatting..." after click
- ✅ Skeleton shimmer appears in preview panel
- ❌ Preview renders error instead of formatted resume

### Group 3: Happy Path — Cover Letter

| # | Test | Result | Notes |
|---|------|--------|-------|
| 3 | Cover letter formatting end-to-end | ❌ FAIL | **BUG-001** — API key not configured |

Same failure mode as test 2.

input.content:
# OhMyDoc — QA Regression Suite

Playwright end-to-end tests for [OhMyDoc](https://ohmydoc.vercel.app), an AI-powered document formatter.

## What's tested

| Group | Scenarios |
|-------|-----------|
| **1. Basic Load** | Page title, textarea visible, Format button disabled when empty, placeholder text, no console errors |
| **2. Happy Path — Resume** | Full resume formatting flow, loading state, preview, no raw XML tags |
| **3. Happy Path — Cover Letter** | Cover letter formatting, content verification |
| **4. Mutation Warning** | DOM inspection for divergence/mutation warning elements |
| **5. PDF Export** | Export button disabled before formatting, enabled after, `window.print()` triggered |
| **6. Validation** | Empty and short input keep Format button disabled |
| **7. Skeleton Loading** | Shimmer appears during load, disappears on completion |
| **8. Sample Content** | Sample content availability (button or placeholder), formatting of sample-like content |

**Total: 15 tests** across 8 feature areas.

## Requirements

- Node.js 18+
- Chromium (installed automatically by Playwright)

## Setup

```bash
npm install
npx playwright install chromium
```

## Running tests

```bash
# Run all tests
npm test

# Run with visible browser
npx playwright test --headed

# Run a specific test group
npx playwright test --grep "8"

# Open HTML report after a run
npm run test:report
```

## Configuration

Tests run against `https://ohmydoc.vercel.app` by default.

Override with the `BASE_URL` environment variable:

```bash
BASE_URL=https://staging.ohmydoc.vercel.app npx playwright test
```

Or create a `.env` file:

```
BASE_URL=https://ohmydoc.vercel.app
```

## CI notes

- Tests run serially (1 worker) — the AI formatting API must not be rate-limited by parallel calls
- AI-dependent tests use a 90s timeout with fast-fail on API errors
- `test.slow()` is set on tests that involve AI calls (expected ~10–20s each)
- Screenshots are saved on failure under `test-results/`

## Known observations

# OhMyDoc — QA Regression Suite

Playwright end-to-end tests for [OhMyDoc](https://ohmydoc.vercel.app), an AI-powered document formatter.

## What's tested

| Group | Scenarios |
|-------|-----------|
| **1. Basic Load** | Page title, textarea visible, Format button disabled when empty, placeholder text, no console errors |
| **2. Happy Path — Resume** | Full resume formatting flow, loading state, preview, no raw XML tags |
| **3. Happy Path — Cover Letter** | Cover letter formatting, content verification |
| **4. Mutation Warning** | DOM inspection for divergence/mutation warning elements |
| **5. PDF Export** | Export button disabled before formatting, enabled after, `window.print()` triggered |
| **6. Validation** | Empty and short input keep Format button disabled |
| **7. Skeleton Loading** | Shimmer appears during load, disappears on completion |
| **8. Sample Content** | Sample content availability (button or placeholder), formatting of sample-like content |

**Total: 15 tests** across 8 feature areas.

## Requirements

- Node.js 18+
- Chromium (installed automatically by Playwright)

## Setup

```bash
npm install
npx playwright install chromium
```

## Running tests

```bash
# Run all tests
npm test

# Run with visible browser
npx playwright test --headed

# Run a specific test group
npx playwright test --grep "8"

# Open HTML report after a run
npm run test:report
```

## Configuration

Tests run against `https://ohmydoc.vercel.app` by default.

Override with the `BASE_URL` environment variable:

```bash
BASE_URL=https://staging.ohmydoc.vercel.app npx playwright test
```

Or create a `.env` file:

```
BASE_URL=https://ohmydoc.vercel.app
```

## CI notes

- Tests run serially (1 worker) — the AI formatting API must not be rate-limited by parallel calls
- AI-dependent tests use a 90s timeout with fast-fail on API errors
- `test.slow()` is set on tests that involve AI calls (expected ~10–20s each)
- Screenshots are saved on failure under `test-results/`

## Known observations

- **No "Load Sample" button**: Sample content is shown as textarea placeholder text only. Tests 8a/8b/8c adapt accordingly; a dedicated "Try Sample" button would improve first-visit UX.
- **Mutation warning**: A divergence banner appears after formatting (observed in test 4) — this is expected behavior when AI rewrites content.

## QA Report — FRG-235: OhMyDoc Regression Suite

**Date:** 2026-03-08  
**Target:** https://ohmydoc.vercel.app  
**Browser:** Chromium (Playwright 1.58.2)  
**Total Tests:** 15 | **Passed:** 15 ✅ | **Failed:** 0  
**Branch:** `qa/frg-235-regression-suite` ([GitHub](https://github.com/chillkimtest-oss/ohmydoc-qa/tree/qa/frg-235-regression-suite))

---

## Summary

All acceptance criteria are met. The regression suite covers every feature listed in the project description, all 15 tests pass against the live deployment, and a README explains how to run the tests.

---

## Test Results

### Group 1: Basic Load

| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 1a | Page title is "OhMyDoc" | ✅ PASS |
| 1b | Textarea visible & accepts input | ✅ PASS |
| 1c | Format button disabled on empty textarea | ✅ PASS |
| 1d | Right panel shows placeholder text | ✅ PASS |
| 1e | No critical console errors on load | ✅ PASS |

### Group 2: Happy Path — Resume
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 2 | Full resume formatting (paste → format → preview) | ✅ PASS (~10s) |

### Group 3: Happy Path — Cover Letter
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 3 | Full cover letter formatting end-to-end | ✅ PASS (~7s) |

### Group 4: Mutation Warning
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 4 | Divergence/mutation warning banner in DOM | ✅ PASS — warning present (`[role="alert"]` confirmed) |

### Group 5: PDF Export
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 5 | Export button disabled before formatting, enabled after; `window.print()` fires | ✅ PASS |

### Group 6: Validation
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 6a | Empty textarea keeps Format button disabled | ✅ PASS |
| 6b | Short input (<50 chars) keeps button disabled | ✅ PASS |

### Group 7: Skeleton Loading
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 7 | Shimmer appears during AI call, disappears on completion | ✅ PASS |

### Group 8: Sample Content
| # | Test | Result |
|---|------|--------|
| 8a | Sample content is available to first-time visitors | ✅ PASS |
| 8b | Sample button (if present) populates textarea | ✅ PASS (informational — see observation) |
| 8c | Sample-style content formats end-to-end | ✅ PASS |

---

## Observations (non-blocking)

### No dedicated "Load Sample" button

The project description mentions "Sample resume available for first-time visitors to test without their own content." Currently, this is implemented only as placeholder text in the textarea (showing an example Jane Smith resume). There is no clickable "Try Sample" or "Load Sample" button.

**Impact:** First-time visitors must know to dismiss the placeholder and type their own content — they cannot load the example with one click.  
**Recommendation:** Add a small "Try sample" button that populates the textarea with the example content. This is a UX improvement, not a blocker.

---

## Technical Notes

- AI-dependent tests handle async wait up to 90s with fast-fail on error detection
- Cover letter formatting uses generic success detection (placeholder gone + button idle) since the AI output structure for cover letters differs from resumes (no name header in formatted output)
- `fillTextarea()` helper ensures Vue's reactive model picks up the fill() event reliably
- 1 retry configured for transient network resilience

---

## Recommendation

✅ **APPROVE** — All acceptance criteria are satisfied:
- Test suite covers all features in the project description
- All 15 tests pass against the current live deployment
- README explains how to run tests

The "Load Sample" button observation is a UX improvement for a future milestone, not a blocker for M1 sign-off.
